text:
For any particular application, there is usually significant room for
improving classifier effectiveness through exploiting features
specific to the domain or
document collection.  Often documents will containzones which are especially useful for classification.
Often there will be particular subvocabularies which demand special
treatment for optimal classification effectiveness.SubsectionsLarge and difficult category taxonomiesFeatures for textDocument zones in text classificationUpweighting document zones.Separate feature spaces for document zones.Connections to text summarization.© 2008 Cambridge University PressThis is an automatically generated page.
